positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u17,axiom,
    extinct(sK0)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    ~extinct(aurochs)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    heck_cattle != aurochs).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define bred_back(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define animal(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u16,axiom,
    heck_cattle != aurochs).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define bred_back(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define extinct(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
